name: Families Below the Nisab — Helsinki
description: Direct relief for local families whose income falls below the nisab, verified with community mosques.

name: Widows & Orphans Fund — Finland
description: Monthly essentials for households in the community with no breadwinner.

name: Debt Relief for Local Families
description: Clears urgent, riba-free debts for people who cannot repay.

name: Stranded Students & Travellers
description: Shelter and support for students and travellers cut off from their means.

name: New Muslim Support — Finland
description: Settling-in support and community for recent converts across Finland.

name: Livelihood & Skills Grants
description: Tools and training so families can earn above the nisab next year.
